headline: U.S. Defense Stock Underperformance: What The Market Is Telling Us
summary: Defense stocks lagged in the Iran conflict. Click for what this means for the overall market and where I am finding appetizing opportunities now.

headline: Defense Stocks Mixed After Iran Cease-Fire. Who’s Winning and Who’s Losing.
summary: Shares of Lockheed and Northrop were lower early on Wednesday, after President Trump announced an Iran cease-fire on Tuesday.
